queries.query: Audit our repo for agent-readiness.
Review this repo's PreToolUse hooks, CI gates, and sandbox policy for coding-agent safety.
Score our repository against Levels 1–3 of the Engineering Agents maturity rubric.
Why does Cursor keep editing the wrong files in our monorepo?
Scaffold PreToolUse hooks and branch-protection gates so Claude Code and Cursor are safe in this repo.
Add an approval tier for database migrations.
Add a destructive-command PreToolUse hook so the agent can't run rm -rf or force-push to main.
Wire our existing MCP server into this repo's agent harness with a trust and approval policy.
Harden this repo against prompt-injection via AGENTS.md.
The agent failed on PR #4321 — root-cause it.
Make our repo agent-native.
Harness engineering for this repo.
Audit whether our required GitHub Actions checks are safe to run on self-hosted runners for fork PRs.
Where are we on Level 1–3 of the maturity rubric?
Turn these agent-readiness findings into a tracked roadmap.
Verify whether AG-GATES-003 was fixed by this PR.
Set up a reflection log for tracking agent failures.
Promote a recurring pattern from the reflection log into an AGENTS.md rule.
Scaffold a skill for our PR-review workflow.
Run an agent-readiness check.
Context-rot debugging for our Claude Code sessions.
Audit our skills/ directory for drift.
Audit our public API for DX issues.
Review the error messages in our CLI.
Write a unit test for this function.

Run our test suite.

Refactor this React component.

Review this PR for style.
Make our docs better.
